problem_statement: The read-only worker path is selected and lease-preflight-bound, but the gap register still requires local rehearsal-only receipt emission. Without a schema-backed rehearsal receipt, a later runtime thread could confuse local dry-run evidence with dispatch success, filesystem mutation, external effects, or terminal closure.
success_criteria: ReadOnlyWorkerRehearsalReceipt validates against the public JSON schema and Foundation Mode example
ReadOnlyWorkerRehearsalReceipt binds read_only_repo_inspection to ReadOnlyWorkerBinding and ReadOnlyWorkerLeasePreflight
runtime dispatch remains denied in Foundation Mode
local rehearsal evidence stays under repo://local/ and evidence://local-repo/path-hash/
network, secrets, filesystem writes, connector calls, raw output retention, terminal closure, and success claims remain denied

focused tests cover valid, authority-drift, worker/preflight-mismatch, dispatch-mode-drift, nonlocal-resource, missing-forbidden-effect, effect/success-drift, receipt-ref-drift, count-drift, CLI, malformed-payload, and SDLC artifact cases
non_goals: no launch, production, customer, or support readiness claim
constraints: the rehearsal receipt is a contract artifact and not a live worker runner
the selected worker path must remain read_only_repo_inspection
future runtime admission must still require temporal lease evidence
worker failure receipt evidence remains mandatory on failure
effect-bearing follow-on dispatch still requires UAO, Phi_gov, life-meaning judgment where applicable, approval where required, recovery evidence, and verification
Mfidel atomicity remains preserved and no text-processing decomposition is introduced
evidence_required: focused pytest receipt for validator behavior
workspace governance preflight receipt before closure claim
